title: _ActionTestRequest
description: The request structure to test a particular Action

limit.description: Used for paginating results. Specifies the maximum number of items to return per page.

offset.description: Used for paginating results. Specifies the offset to use. Defaults to 0

authentication.description: Authentication, if required, to be able to run the given Action

inputs.description: Inputs to be provided to the given 'read' Action's test run
